case_title: FIROOZEH SOTOODEH VS. DESIGN JEWELERS INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,660.00 FILED BY SOTOODEH, FIROOZEH AS TO DEFENDANT DESIGN JEWELERS INC. GARABEDIAN, NAZO DBA DESIGN JEWELERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOTOODEH, FIROOZEH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DESIGN JEWELERS INC. GARABEDIAN, NAZO DBA DESIGN JEWELERS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DESIGN JEWELERS INC. GARABEDIAN, NAZO DBA DESIGN JEWELERS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2009 - CONTINUED FOR TRIAL ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-25-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS ADVISED IN COURT THAT SHE MAY APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. DEFENDANT SHALL EMAIL TO PLAINTIFF BEFORE THE TRIAL ANY DOCUMENTS IT INTENDS TO PRESENT AT TRIAL. BOTH PARTIES HAVE STIPULATED THAT JUDGE PRO TEM MCDONALD MAY HEAR THIS TRIAL.
